title: sida acuta var. stipulata
intro: Sida acuta var. stipulata, also known as the prickly sida or prickly fan petal, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family, characterized by its prickly stems and leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sida acuta var. stipulata include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
